title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Dineout Capital India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Dineout Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Dineout Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dineout Capital India:
Dineout Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
